subcodes.first_line: O Báqir! This Wronged One hath accepted the tribulations of the world for the preservation of mankind. By the life of God! His only purpose was to quench the fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا باقر اینمظلوم بلایای عالمرا لاجل حفظ امم قبول نمود لعمرالله جز اطفاء نار
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @justice and wrath of God
